## Problem

What user problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the workflow or capability you want.

## Why This Fits

Explain why this belongs in a bootstrap/catalog generation tool instead of a separate system.

## Alternatives Considered

What are you doing today instead?
